name: Grok-3 (Think)
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts (size undisclosed; trained on Colossus, ~10x Grok-2 compute)
note: Reasoning "Think"/Big Brain mode of Grok 3; hit #1 on Chatbot Arena at launch (~1400 Elo, per rdworldonline.com). Deprecated May 15, 2026, redirects to Grok 4.3.

results.notes: LMSYS Chatbot Arena Elo, #1 at launch

verificationNotes: CORRECTED: the GPQA=84.6 row's original sourceUrl (futureagi.com) was fetched and does NOT contain '84.6' anywhere on the page (it shows GPQA Diamond 75.4%, which belongs to the non-reasoning/Standard mode). Multiple independent sources confirm xAI's official claim of 84.6% GPQA for Think mode (matching AIME 93.3%/LiveCodeBench 79.4%), and chatbase.co/blog/grok-3 was fetched directly and literally contains '84.6' attributed to GPQA alongside the matching 93.3/79.4 figures, so the sourceUrl was swapped to that page. AIME 93.3, LiveCodeBench 79.4, and MMLU-Pro 79.9 were each confirmed literally present on the original futureagi.com page via direct fetch. Arena Elo 1400 confirmed literally on rdworldonline.com ('achieve a score of 1,400').
